description: Simulator-verified plan-level financial decisions with counterfactual rationales, plus out-of-scope refusals. Faithfulness-by-construction: every rationale number is a copy of a stored Monte Carlo score.
name: slm/data/sample_dataset.jsonl
scale_note: pipeline-validation scale (pre-Plans-14/15; not a publishable adviser)
teacher_gating: DQN excluded (protocol report: verdict_intelligent=false, ci_does_not_overlap_best=false); candidates = heuristics + Roth/pre-tax levers, label = grid argmax.
